name: Adaptogen Blend
shortDescription: Stress response and steady energy. No jitters.
longDescription: Rhodiola, ashwagandha, schisandra. Sourced for potency and tested. East-meets-west formulation for daily use. Withanolides (ashwagandha), salidroside (rhodiola), schisandrins. HPA modulation, cortisol rhythm support.
mechanismSummary: Withanolides, salidroside, schisandrins. HPA axis modulation, cortisol rhythm.

name: Calm Spirit Blend
shortDescription: TCM-inspired. Nourish heart, calm spirit. Sleep and rest.
longDescription: Inspired by the classical formula Suan Zao Ren Tang (酸棗仁湯). Sour jujube seed (酸棗仁), poria (茯苓), longan, and supporting herbs. Cultural frame: nourish Heart, calm Shen (spirit). Scientific: flavonoid and saponin content; supports wind-down and sleep quality without heavy sedation. Physiological amplification of natural rest state.
culturalClassification: Calm spirit (安神). Nourish Heart, settle Shen.
mechanismSummary: Jujube flavonoids, saponins. GABAergic modulation, sleep architecture support.

name: Qi Support Blend
shortDescription: TCM-inspired. Qi tonifying. Energy and capacity.
longDescription: Inspired by Si Jun Zi Tang (四君子湯), the Four Gentlemen. Ginseng (人參), atractylodes (白朮), poria (茯苓), licorice (甘草). Cultural frame: tonify Spleen and Lung Qi; support digestion and vitality. Scientific: ginsenosides, atractylenolides; metabolic and HPA support. Amplifies sustained energy and adaptation.
culturalClassification: Qi tonifying (補氣). Spleen-Lung. Four Gentlemen direction.
mechanismSummary: Ginsenosides, atractylenolides. Metabolic and HPA support, sustained output.

name: Ginger (dried)
shortDescription: TCM 乾薑 direction. Warming, digestive, circulation.
longDescription: Dried ginger rhizome. TCM: Gan Jiang (乾薑); warming, dispel cold, support middle burner (digestion). Molecules: gingerols, 6-gingerol, shogaols. COX-2 modulation; digestive motility; anti-nausea. Use alone or as building block in blends. Physiological amplification of digestive fire and circulation.
culturalClassification: Single herb — warming (溫). Dispel cold, warm middle.
mechanismSummary: Gingerols, 6-gingerol, shogaols. COX-2 modulation, digestive motility.

name: Turmeric (curcumin)
shortDescription: Jiāng Huáng / Haridra. Curcuminoids, recovery, inflammation response.
longDescription: Turmeric rhizome, standardized for curcuminoids. TCM: Jiang Huang (薑黃); move Blood, invigorate. Ayurveda: Haridra. Curcumin, demethoxycurcumin; COX-2, NF-κB pathway modulation. Recovery and inflammation response. Use alone or in stacks with black pepper (piperine) for bioavailability.
culturalClassification: Single herb — move Blood (活血). Vedic: cleansing, skin/joint.
mechanismSummary: Curcuminoids. COX-2, NF-κB modulation. Recovery, inflammatory load.

name: Sleep Stack
longDescription: Magnesium, l-theanine, and a small amount of melatonin. Designed for sleep quality, not knockout. Non-habit-forming. Magnesium: cofactor, neuromuscular. L-theanine: GABA, alpha waves. Physiological amplification of natural wind-down.
mechanismSummary: Magnesium, l-theanine, melatonin. GABAergic, circadian support.

name: Ashwagandha Root (KSM-66) 1kg
longDescription: KSM-66 ashwagandha in bulk. For practitioners, formulators, or the committed. Certificate of analysis available. Withanolides; HPA modulation, adaptation.

name: Recovery Blend
shortDescription: Turmeric, ginger, black pepper. Post-load. Anti-inflammatory.
longDescription: Turmeric, ginger, black pepper (piperine). TCM/Ayurvedic building blocks in one formula. Curcuminoids, gingerols; piperine for bioavailability. COX-2 modulation; recovery and inflammation response. Athlete-tested, no banned substances. Physiological amplification of recovery pathways.
culturalClassification: Blend — move Blood, reduce stagnation. Digestive fire (ginger), bioavailability (pepper).
mechanismSummary: Curcuminoids, gingerols, piperine. COX-2, bioavailability. Recovery, inflammatory load.

name: Open Source Phone (PinePhone-style)
shortDescription: Your data stays yours. No backdoors.
longDescription: Linux-capable, replaceable battery, hardware kill switches. For the health-conscious and situationally aware. Ships with privacy-focused OS options.

name: Countertop Water Filter
longDescription: Removes chlorine, lead, and common contaminants. One-time purchase, replaceable cartridges. Designed for tap water you can trust.

name: Desktop 3D Printer (Open Frame)
shortDescription: Repairable. Open firmware. Minimal manufacturing hub.
longDescription: Print parts, enclosures, tools. Open-source firmware and design. For makers who want control and longevity.
